text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A race set to a backdrop of falling cherry
blossoms—the Oka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Vodka who went into races prepared for the
chance that she might lose is gone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now determined to win every race, Vodka faces
off against her biggest rival, Daiwa Scarlet, in the
first race of the Classics.
